entry.title: The 5 Best AI Video Models in 2026, Tested and Compared
entry.summary: Five AI video models lead in 2026: Seedance 2.0 for multi-shot films and ads, Veo 3.1 for outdoor and atmospheric scenes, WAN 2.6 for restyling existing footage, Kling 3.0 for character-driven stories in 4K, and MiniMax for fast short-form. All five run inside Higgsfield from $15/month, and the full Seedance 2.0 model unlocks on the Plus plan.

entry.title: Why Does Your AI Character's Face Keep Changing?
entry.summary: AI characters drift because diffusion models have no memory. Here's why faces change between generations, and how Midjourney, LoRA and Higgsfield Soul ID fix it.
